prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次分别为5497→7593→7222→5981→7169，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约7169名；2021–2025年计划数分别为 189→194→179→170→181人，2026年物理类计划202人，较2025年扩招约11.6%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与四川大学优势工科方向匹配；陕西2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加 剧；四川大学位于成都，与陕西相邻，地域偏好较强，跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招约11.6%的缓解效 应与陕西物理类考生增长约19.7%的加剧效应，扩招幅度不及考生增幅，叠加学校声誉负面舆情对报考热度的潜在抑制，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准7169名基础上后移；预 测最低位次约7718名，区间7218–8218名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were 5497→7593→7222→5981→7169, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a baseline of approximately 7169 in 2025; enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 189→194→179→170→181, and the 2026 Physics Category plan is 202, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 14–16 range in recent years, indicating a very high university level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', with 51 incidents (46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinion, which may suppress candidates' application psychology to some extent; Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, etc., with balanced strength in medicine, humanities, and engineering, and strong appeal of flagship majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, matching Sichuan University's advantageous engineering fields; the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, adjacent to Shaanxi, with strong regional preference and high cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the mitigating effect of an approximately 11.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 and the intensifying effect of an approximately 19.7% increase in Shaanxi Physics Category candidates, the expansion rate is less than the candidate growth rate, combined with the potential suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation incidents, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 7169; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7718, with a range of 7218–8218.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 516 → 428 → 573 → 752 → 712 respectively, showing a general backward shift in recent years, with a baseline of approximately 712 in 2025; enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 18 → 19 → 25 → 31 → 30 people, and the 2026 history category plan is 29 people, a slight reduction of about 3.3% compared to 2025, with a relatively small reduction magnitude.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (Top 20), indicating an extremely high university level; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', with 51 reported incidents (46 negative), mainly involving teacher ethics, academic misconduct, and other public opinions, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Archaeology A-, etc., with outstanding strength in humanities, history, and philosophy disciplines, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese language/Chinese major is socially popular, law is divided in observation but still has popularity; in 2026, Shaanxi history category candidates are approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 75,641 in 2025, showing significant growth in candidate numbers and intensified competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, adjacent to Shaanxi, with a strong regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight reduction of about 3.3% in 2026 and the increase of about 17.0% in Shaanxi history category candidates, the candidate growth far exceeds the reduction magnitude, increasing competitive pressure, coupled with the university's negative reputation public opinion, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 712; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 728, with a range of 641–815.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在陕西省医学类单独招生，2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为10400、5836、7222、5836、3417，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），竞争逐年加剧。招生计划方 面，2021年19人、2022年22人、2023年23人、2024年10人、2025年14人，2026年计划为14人，与2025年持平。计划不变意味着供需关系未发生结构性变化，但近年医学类报考热度 持续升温，位次仍有进一步上移的动力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校（A类）。学校综合实力雄厚，医学学科是其传统优势领域，华西医学中心 在全国享有极高声誉，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，尤其临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争激烈。四川大学地处成都，属于西南地区中心城市，城市吸引力强。陕西省医学类招生规模较小（2 026年仅14人），稀缺性进一步推高了位次门槛。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势和招生计划，2026年四川大学在陕西省医学类最低录取位次预计为3367名，较2025年小幅上升（位次数字减小），波动区间为3199至3535名。建议考生结 合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Sichuan University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Shaanxi Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 10400, 5836, 7222, 5836, and 3417 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with intensifying competition year by year. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 19 students in 2021, 22 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, with the 2026 plan set at 14, unchanged from 2025. The unchanged plan indicates no structural change in supply-demand relationship, but the recent surge in popularity of medical programs continues to drive rankings further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university has strong comprehensive strength, with medical disciplines being its traditional advantage. Huaxi Medical Center enjoys a very high reputation nationwide, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, especially clinical medicine, stomatology, and other programs with fierce competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, a central city in the southwestern region, with strong urban appeal. The enrollment scale for medical programs in Shaanxi Province is small (only 14 students in 2026), and scarcity further raises the ranking threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on historical ranking fluctuation trends and enrollment plans, the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Shaanxi Province in 2026 is predicted to be 3367, slightly higher than 2025 (decreasing ranking number), with a fluctuation range of 3199 to 3535. It is recommended that candidates position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
